examples: Jack saw his chance, climbed through the window, grabbed the harp and ran off to the beanstalk.
One day, when his mum wasn't looking, he sneaked out of the house and climbed the beanstalk again!
With Beanstalk, you pay for the services you use, but not for the cloud formation services themselves.
Brian Singer's adventure, based on the fairytale Jack and the Beanstalk, also stars Nicholas Hoult and Ewan McGregor.
